description: Pushing to Dolt remote... fails in this repository because no Dolt remote is configured (No remotes configured. returns none and push errors with remote 'origin' not found). Add the team-approved Dolt remote configuration so the required session landing workflow can push beads history successfully.
title: Configure beads Dolt remote for push workflow

description: The AI Assistant currently prepends new messages instead of showing the latest turn at the bottom, and the web client does not use assistant conversation sessions, so follow-up instructions like 'ignore the Transfer type' are lost between turns. Investigate the chat UI ordering, wire the web assistant to conversation endpoints, and ensure the orchestration agent persists enough conversation history for follow-up questions to affect later answers.
title: Fix AI assistant chat ordering and follow-up context

acceptance_criteria: All child tasks are completed and the affected pages reflect the requested behavior and content changes.
description: Track the requested UX and product cleanup pass across Explorer, Transactions, Dashboard, and Settings. This epic covers shared filter persistence, export workflow relocation, dashboard metric/chart adjustments, Explorer workspace cleanup, and Settings simplification/removal of redundant sections.
title: Resolve explorer, dashboard, transactions, and settings UX cleanup

acceptance_criteria: Explorer no longer shows the export button. Transactions exposes a working export action and exports the expected dataset for the active view/filter state.
description: Remove the export button from Explorer, add the export action to Transactions, and ensure the export flow produces a working output from the Transactions page. The export should respect the active transaction/filter context instead of being a dead or misplaced control.
title: Move export from Explorer to Transactions and make exports work

acceptance_criteria: Dashboard no longer presents the metric as spending trend. The relevant card/chart/labels communicate net flow and the displayed values are consistent with net inflow/outflow behavior.
description: Update the Dashboard so the current spending trend visualization/metric is replaced by net flow. Any supporting copy, legends, or labels should describe net flow rather than spending-only behavior.
title: Change Dashboard spending trend metric to net flow

acceptance_criteria: Settings no longer shows Taxonomy and Rules. The resulting UX reflects that categorization inference is driven by LLM plus historical data rather than a duplicate manual taxonomy/rules surface in Settings.
description: Remove the Taxonomy and Rules section from Settings because it is redundant. Category inference should be treated as an LLM and history-data-driven behavior rather than being surfaced here as a separate redundant settings area.
title: Remove Taxonomy and Rules from Settings and rely on LLM plus history inference

acceptance_criteria: The Categories chart no longer appears in the Category workspace on the Explorer page, and the remaining layout still reads cleanly without it.
description: Simplify the Explorer category workspace by removing the Categories chart from that view.
title: Remove Categories chart from Explorer category workspace

acceptance_criteria: Changing the Dashboard data range changes the number of rendered bars when the range calls for a different number of periods. The chart no longer stays locked to 7 bars regardless of selection.
description: Fix the Dashboard chart so it does not always render exactly 7 bars. The number of bars should adjust based on the currently selected data range and underlying data granularity.
title: Make Dashboard bar count respond to selected data range

acceptance_criteria: Settings no longer shows the Profile and Preferences section, and the remaining page structure still works cleanly without orphaned spacing or references.
description: Remove the Profile and Preferences section from Settings as part of the requested Settings simplification pass.
title: Remove Profile and Preferences from Settings

acceptance_criteria: Navigating away from Explorer or Transactions and back preserves the active filters. Shared filters stay synchronized between the affected pages and only clear when the user explicitly resets them.
description: Keep filter state from Explorer and Transactions when navigating to other pages. The active filter state should persist until the user explicitly resets it, and the same shared state should be reused across the website where these views rely on the same filtering context.
title: Persist and share Explorer and Transactions filters across navigation

acceptance_criteria: Settings no longer shows the Copilot Two-Category Strategy section, and no broken navigation or empty placeholder remains behind.
description: Remove the Copilot Two-Category Strategy section from Settings because it substantially duplicates functionality and guidance that already lives on the Categories page.
title: Remove Copilot Two-Category Strategy from Settings

acceptance_criteria: Hovering a capsule in Compressed Weekday Spend shows useful contextual information instead of doing nothing. The visible guidance matches the implemented interaction, and the hover content is consistent with the chart's actual data and terminology.
description: Fix the Explorer page's Compressed Weekday Spend interaction. The UI currently says 'Hover for totals', but hovering a capsule does not show anything. Investigate the underlying data already available for this visualization and add an appropriate hover treatment so the control actually teaches the user something useful. At minimum, the hover content should explain the hovered weekday/capsule and surface meaningful metrics drawn from the chart's data, such as total spend or net amount and any other context needed to make the capsule interpretable.
title: Implement hover details for Explorer Compressed Weekday Spend capsules
